title: The insect monitoring as a preventive pest control method
subtitle: La monitorización de insectos como método de control preventivo de plagas
description: This guide presents insect monitoring techniques as a preventive pest control strategy within SMART Integrated Pest Management for vegetable production. It details tools like chromotropic plates, traditional and automatic traps (e.g., TRAPVIEW), and mobile applications for real-time monitoring and decision support.
